name: codex-loops
description: Use when a user explicitly asks for Codex Loops or path-first dynamic workflow orchestration through the Codex SDK.

interface.shortDescription: Author, test, and execute deterministic workflow files.
interface.longDescription: Codex Loops packages one opt-in skill for the published codex-loops package. It authors path-first workflow files, tests them with the selected provider, and runs live workflows through the Codex SDK when requested. The installed CLI command remains agent-loops for compatibility.
defaultPrompt: Turn this task into a Codex Loops workflow file.
Test this workflow script with bounded args first.
Execute this tested Codex Loops workflow.
